Single-pass retrieval (one call, no agentic loops). What changed: Single-pass ADD-only extraction -- one LLM call, no UPDATE/DELETE. Memories accumulate; nothing is overwritten. Agent-generated facts are first-class -- when an agent confirms an action, that information is now stored with equal weight. Entity linking -- entities are extracted, embedded, and linked across memories for retrieval boosting. Multi-signal retrieval -- semantic, BM25 keyword, and entity matching scored in parallel and fused. Temporal Reasoning -- time-aware retrieval that ranks the right dated instance for queries about current state, past events, and upcoming plans. See the migration guide for upgrade instructions. The evaluation framework is open-sourced so anyone can reproduce the numbers.
